cart.empty: Your Cart is empty. Start adding favorite products to cart!

checkout.title: Check Out
checkout.emptyCartDescription: Add products to your cart before choosing a payment method.
checkout.privacyNotice: Your personal data will be used to process your order, support your experience throughout this website, and for other purposes described in our
checkout.reviewFields: Please review this field in the form:
checkout.saleNote: Offers are not eligible if an already discounted item or a gift card is in your cart
checkout.shipWithinSriLanka: Currently, we only ship within Sri Lanka!
checkout.shipDifferentDescription: Fill the shipping address to continue
checkout.insufficientStockDescription: We're sorry, but some items in your cart are currently out of stock or have insufficient quantities available. Please adjust your order accordingly.
checkout.removeOutOfStockPrompt: Some items in your cart are out of stock. Would you like to proceed by removing them?
checkout.orderDetailsEmail: You will receive a email with your order details
checkout.paymentRedirectMissing: Could not get payment redirect URL
checkout.redirectToPayment: You will redirect to the payment page
checkout.orderTimeout: Order request timed out. Please try again.
checkout.orderFailed: Unable to place order. Please try again later.

payment.bankTransferInstructions: Make your payment directly into our bank account. Please use your Order Number as the payment reference. Your order will not be shipped until the funds have cleared in our account. Send us the payment slip/ receipt via WhatsApp :
